description: Shared content/layout shapes referenced by app.blento.node's open blobs. Typed cards (#link, #image, …) are added additively; #card / #container are the generic fallbacks.

card.description: Generic leaf content fallback. cardType discriminates; remaining fields are the card's opaque data.

container.description: Generic container content fallback. containerType discriminates; remaining fields are the container config.

gridCell.description: Position within a grid container. Integers only.
